name: hexis/error-digest-bundle
description: Symfony bundle that captures Monolog errors, deduplicates them by fingerprint, emails a daily digest of new/spiking/top issues to admins, and provides a triage UI.

suggest.symfony/mailer: Required for the default MailerDigestSender — emails the daily digest to admins.
suggest.symfony/notifier: Enables the NotifierDigestSender — chat-channel summaries via Slack, Teams, Discord, etc.
suggest.symfony/messenger: Dispatches SendDailyDigest via bus; route to an async transport to keep digest work off the request path.
suggest.symfony/ux-live-component: Unlocks the optional live-tail component in the triage UI.
suggest.symfony/ux-turbo: Smoother in-page status/assignee updates without full reloads.
